channel.title: GitHub CSS Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CSS in GitHub

item.title: spicetify/spicetify-themes
item.description: A community-driven collection of themes for customizing Spotify through Spicetify - https://github.com/spicetify/cli

item.title: jothepro/doxygen-awesome-css
item.description: Custom CSS theme for doxygen html-documentation with lots of customization parameters.

item.title: bradtraversy/50projects50days
item.description: 50+ mini web projects using HTML, CSS & JS

item.title: kepano/obsidian-minimal
item.description: A distraction-free and highly customizable theme for Obsidian.

item.title: nakov/Practical-Cryptography-for-Developers-Book
item.description: Practical Cryptography for Developers: Hashes, MAC, Key Derivation, DHKE, Symmetric and Asymmetric Ciphers, Public Key Cryptosystems, RSA, Elliptic Curves, ECC, secp256k1, ECDH, ECIES, Digital Signatures, ECDSA, EdDSA

item.title: ParisNeo/lollms-webui
item.description: Lord of Large Language Models Web User Interface

item.title: creativetimofficial/argon-dashboard-asp-net
item.description: Start your development with a Bootstrap 4 Admin Dashboard built for ASP.NET Core framework, the newest go-to technology from Microsoft for top companies.

item.title: ryanoasis/nerd-fonts
item.description: Iconic font aggregator, collection, & patcher. 3,600+ icons, 50+ patched fonts: Hack, Source Code Pro, more. Glyph collections: Font Awesome, Material Design Icons, Octicons, & more
